violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of frozen food observed stored on the floor of the walk in freezer.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed outside of equipment needing to be cleaned more frequently.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Ice scoops stored on top of ice machine without adequate protection
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
